keys.description: Dispatch SeedDefaultOrganizationForTenantJob on tenancy::TenantProvisioned. Off = tenants land with zero Organizations (only valid for tests / migration seeds).
When true, the default org's `category` is inferred from `tenant.business_type` via config('organization.category_map'). When false, defaults to `mixed`.
Maps a tenant's business_type slug to an Organization category enum value.
Cap on tree_depth. Rows are 0-indexed (root = depth 0). max_depth=5 means five levels of nesting under a root. Enforced by `parent_within_depth_cap` rule + OrganizationObserver.
Master switch for the POST /reparent endpoint. Off = create + delete only; parent_id is immutable after create. Compliance-heavy tenants may prefer immutable trees.
The boolean entitlement gating parent_id use. Change here also changes what the observer + policy check for.

Distinct from creation-time nesting — this entitlement is the extra gate on POST-create moves. A tenant may nest at create time (organization_hierarchy) yet forbid post-create moves (organization_reparent) — locking the tree after initial setup for audit rigor.
Separator character in the materialised tree_path. NEVER change on a live tenant — every existing row would need rebuilding. Reserve for greenfield deploys.
Boolean entitlement gating logo_url + primary_color + secondary_color + description writes.
Fallback primary color when an org has no branding + the tenant has no default branding.
Cron for ReconcileDefaultOrganizationInvariantJob. Default = daily 03:00 UTC.
auto = repair drift immediately + fire OrganizationDefaultChanged; alert-only = fire OrganizationDefaultInvariantViolated + block reads until support intervenes.
Hard-delete an archived Organization row after this many days IF no descendants + no branch references remain.
PurgeArchivedOrganizationsJob batch size. Small to avoid holding row-level locks across many rows.
PCRE for slug validation. Enforces lowercase, alphanumeric + hyphen, no leading/trailing hyphens. Length 2..64 enforced separately by the FormRequest.

Slugs that would collide with routing / infra keywords. Enforced by the `organization_slug_reserved` rule. NOTE: 'default' is on this list even though the default org SEEDER uses slug='default' — the observer allows the seeder path (is_default=true + system-context) as a bypass.
TTL for `org:tree:{tenant_id}` and `org:descendants:*`. Long because writes are rare + tags handle invalidation.
